description: Generated Google Workspace Drive read-only MCP catalog manifest.

notes: Official Google API Discovery Service document for Google Drive API v3.
Google documents Discovery documents as machine-readable metadata for Google APIs.

Google publishes Discovery documents for these Workspace APIs rather than a first-party OpenAPI repository; this manifest pins the official source document used for selected read-only Drive operations.

network: GET https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files for selected upstream operation
GET https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/about for selected upstream operation
process: Run pnpm build/test scripts only inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
Run node only as invoked by generated project package scripts inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
